title: Slack trigger fails on new user creation
symptom: When a new user is created in Slack, the Slack trigger throws a TypeError indicating it cannot read properties of undefined. This prevents the workflow from executing as expected.
applies_when: Using Slack trigger for new user events
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different n8n version
root_cause: The error occurs because the Slack trigger is not correctly handling the event type for new user creation. It attempts to access properties related to channels that do not apply to this event, leading to an undefined reference.
fix_steps: Wait for the fix to be merged into a future release of n8n
Update n8n to the latest version once the fix is available
agent_instruction: Monitor for updates on the Slack trigger fix and upgrade n8n when available.
